testcase.name: testAddUser
testcase.system-out: { "success": true, "message": "User created successfully", "data": { "active": true, "email": "suki1778074518750@example.com", "fullName": "Suki ahmad", "id": "dd394e6a-c7b6-4ef3-96ba-26488d92316a", "ipAddress": null, "lastAccess": null, "photo": null, "roles": [ "ROLE_USER" ], "username": "Suki1778074518750" } } ID User yang didapat: dd394e6a-c7b6-4ef3-96ba-26488d92316a
